Python Flask Tutorial: Flask is a lightweight WSGI web framework for Python that makes it easy to build REST APIs and web applications with minimal boilerplate. This tutorial covers routing, request/response handling, Jinja2 templating, and connecting to a SQLite database via SQLAlchemy. We demonstrate how to structure a Flask application using the application factory pattern and Blueprints for modular code organization. By the end, readers will have a working CRUD API with input validation and error handling.
